title: Return Method
text: Return Method Location of values returned by non-Uniface operations at run time. Valid values are None , In $status (default; mandatory for Uniface components and service stored procedures), or In first parameter . Value Description None Returned values are discarded (cast to void), unless there are errors. This is the default value for Java implementations. In $status (default) Return the value of the function to $status . Select a data type for the return value from the drop-down list. The default is Long . Mandatory value for Uniface components and service stored procedures. In first parameter Return value in the first parameter of the operation. If the operation does not have a first parameter defined as Out, you are warned that it is not possible to specify a return value in the first parameter. Applies To Signature Was this topic helpful?
